meta_title: For Founders: deployment workflow to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to deployment workflow and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Deployment Workflow to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on 'no project ideas.' Learn a professional deployment workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS MVP at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The solution to 'no project ideas' isn't inspiration; it's a repeatable deployment engine. By automating your infrastructure with Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform small, validated experiments into live SaaS products in minutes, allowing you to iterate on real-world market feedback rather than waiting for the perfect epiphany.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’re sitting there, scrolling through Twitter, waiting for a lightning bolt of genius that never strikes. Meanwhile, the market is moving, and the window of opportunity for your potential SaaS is closing. You don't need a perfect idea; you need a high-velocity machine that turns half-baked concepts into functional, live products.

This isn't about writing more code—it's about removing the friction between your intent and the cloud. By leveraging Antigravity for infrastructure and Claude Code for iterative development, you can deploy a functional MVP in an afternoon. Stop waiting for inspiration and start building the feedback loop that actually makes money.

steps.title: Define the Micro-SaaS Scope
steps.description: Narrow your focus to a single, high-pain problem. Use Claude to refine a scope that can be built in 48 hours to ensure rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a project structure for a micro-SaaS that solves a specific, high-pain B2B problem and is deployable in 48 hours. Focus on lean architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze my market pain point and generate a project file structure for a lean MVP.'

steps.title: Automate Infrastructure with Antigravity
steps.description: Don't waste time on AWS consoles. Use Antigravity to provision your stack instantly so your code has a home.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provision a scalable, serverless backend infrastructure with a database and authentication layer, optimized for low-latency SaaS performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute the Antigravity infrastructure provisioning script for a serverless stack.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the MVP Core
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the business logic. Focus purely on the 'Value-Add' feature that solves the user's problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic for the MVP, focusing on clean code, modular functions, and robust error handling for a SaaS environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --src ./src --prompt 'Build the primary feature logic based on the project requirements.'

steps.title: Configure the CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Establish a deployment workflow that triggers a live push every time you commit, ensuring your project is always ready for users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline that automates testing and deployment to production, ensuring zero-downtime updates for the SaaS product.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure the deployment pipeline to trigger on every push to the main branch.'

steps.title: Launch and Iterate
steps.description: Push to production and collect your first piece of real-world feedback. Use the data to pivot or double down.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a post-launch analytics integration script to track user behavior within the application and identify friction points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Finalize build and execute production deployment to the live endpoint.'

pro_tips: Always build for the '1-hour user'—if they can't get value in 60 minutes, your MVP is too complex.
Use Antigravity to keep your infrastructure as code; if you can't redeploy from scratch in 5 minutes, your setup is too brittle.
Treat your Claude Code prompts as documentation; save them in a /prompts folder to recreate your process for future projects.
Don't build custom auth; integrate a managed provider immediately to save 20+ hours of security engineering.
Prioritize 'Deploy Frequency' as your primary metric—the faster you ship, the faster you find product-market fit.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend the next 24 hours performing 'manual sales'—message 50 potential users directly. Do not build features until you have 5 paying customers.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting 'no project ideas' hold your business back. You have the tools, the workflow, and the strategy to build a revenue-generating asset today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
